title: قانون رقم (4) لسنة 2009 باعتماد الميزانية العامة للدولة للسنتين الماليتين 2009 و 2010
title_en: Law No. (19) of 2008 Amending Certain Provisions of the Law Regulating Pensions and Retirement Gratuities for Officers and Personnel of the Bahrain Defence Force and Public Security, promulgated by Legislative Decree No. (11) of 1976
